expectations.text: The answer starts with ID discovery using current user and transaction account listing before detail calls.
expectations.evidence: Lines 15-22 put `pocketsmith_get_current_user`, `pocketsmith_list_transaction_accounts`, and feed status before detail calls.

expectations.text: The answer includes a feed freshness gate before treating the monthly close as final.
expectations.evidence: Lines 40-53 define the feed freshness gate and say stale feeds block final metrics.

expectations.text: The answer includes explicit delegation triggers for truncated outputs or many ambiguous transactions.
expectations.evidence: Lines 114-124 list delegation triggers including truncated output and more than 5 ambiguous transactions.

expectations.text: The answer says not to edit the note until metrics are stable or the user asks for a provisional entry.
expectations.evidence: Lines 3, 9-10, and 153-164 defer note edits until data and metrics are stable.
